_comment: DevFlow per-language tool presets. Single source of truth for `/devflow:init` (via scripts/detect-project-tools.sh) — detects each language by its marker file(s) and unions the matching `allowed_tools` into config.devflow.allowed_tools, devflow_implement.allowed_tools, and devflow_runner.allowed_tools, plus contributes to the shared `setup` block. Edit here; do NOT hand-list tools in a repo's config.json. SECURITY: the devflow / devflow_implement entries run a PR author's code in their respective workflows. The devflow_runner.allowed_tools entries reach the automated reviewer only when devflow_runner.provision_env is set in the trusted base config (which runs PR build code on pull_request_target + write token), and the runner enforces a deny-list floor over them. Keep entries to mainstream build/test/lint tools — never the deny-listed tier (Edit/Write/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit, raw-shell/eval/privilege Bash) — and resolve which install command to use from the present lockfile (see scripts/detect-project-tools.sh).
